mapper.select: SELECT mgm.cug_id ,mgm.cug_nm ,dcm.cug_expl ,mgm.use_yn ,mgm.prp_sttl_abl_yn ,TO_CHAR(dcm.stm_fir_reg_date,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') stm_fir_reg_date ,reg.user_nm as regNm ,TO_CHAR(dcm.stm_last_upd_date,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') stm_last_upd_date ,upd.user_nm as updNm FROM mn_cug_mst mgm ,dm_cug_mst dcm ,ad_user_mst reg ,ad_user_mst upd WHERE 1=1 AND mgm.cug_id = dcm.cug_id AND reg.user_id(+) = dcm.stm_fir_reg_user_id AND upd.user_id(+) = dcm.stm_last_upd_user_id AND mgm.cug_id = #{cugId} AND mg.use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT dmst.modl_cd ,mdl.model_name AS modlNm ,(select cd_nm from ad_comm_cd where comm_cd = dmst.modl_fg_cd and comm_grp_cd = 'MODL_FG_CD') modlFgNm ,(select cd_nm from ad_comm_cd where comm_cd = dmst.modl_os_fg_cd and comm_grp_cd = 'MODL_OS_FG_CD') modlFgNm ,(select cd_nm from ad_comm_cd where comm_cd = dmst.modl_manufr_fg_cd and comm_grp_cd = 'MODL_MANUFR_FG_CD') modlManufrFgNm ,dmst.use_yn FROM dm_cug_mst mst, dm_cug_dvc_modl_map map, dm_dvc_modl_mst dmst, stb_model mdl WHERE mst.cug_id = #{cugId} AND mst.cug_id = map.cug_id AND map.modl_cd = dmst.modl_cd AND dmst.modl_cd = mdl.model_code AND map.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY mdl.model_name

-- CUG 롤백/인증 목록 조회 SELECT mgm.cug_id ,mgm.cug_nm , ( SELECT count(*) FROM DM_CUG_DVC_MODL_MAP WHERE MODL_CD = #{modlCd} AND cug_id = mgm.cug_id ) modl_cd , ( SELECT count(*) FROM um_upd_plan_stbl_ver_map WHERE modl_cd = #{modlCd} AND cug_id = mgm.cug_id AND REQ_SVC ='authbtv' ) mappingCount FROM mn_cug_mst mgm WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(mgm.cug_nm) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{textCugNm}) || '%'
AND mgm.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY modl_cd DESC, mgm.cug_nm ASC
